managed for you.

What's Included

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Six systems that usually cost $300+ to cobble together yourself — plus the 10 hours a month to keep them running. We handle all of it.

🌐

Hosting & Domain

Lightning-fast site on a global CDN. Custom domain, SSL certificate, and DNS management. 99.9% uptime, zero config on your end.

✉

Transactional Email

Form confirmations, order receipts, lead notifications — all sent from your domain with proper DKIM/SPF. No more Gmail relay hacks.

📋

Form → CRM Routing

Every form submission lands in your database automatically. Contact forms, lead magnets, quiz completions — captured and organized.

📈

Analytics & Reporting

Page views, traffic sources, conversion funnels, and top content — delivered in a monthly report you can actually understand.

🛠

Monthly Site Updates

New landing pages, copy changes, seasonal campaigns, blog posts. Up to 4 hours of hands-on updates every month, included.

🔒

Uptime & Security

SSL auto-renewal, dependency updates, uptime monitoring, and error alerts. If something breaks at 2am, we fix it — not you.

How It Works

Up and running in a week.

We migrate your existing site or build from scratch. Either way, you're live fast.

01

Kickoff call

30 minutes. We audit your current stack, map your forms and integrations, and agree on the migration plan.

02

We build & migrate

Your site goes live on our infrastructure. Domain, SSL, email, forms, analytics — all wired up and tested.

03

You grow, we maintain

Monthly updates, monitoring, and support. You focus on revenue — we keep the engine running.

Why Managed?

DIY stack vs. Treetop-managed.

Doing It Yourself

  • 5+ vendor accounts to manage and pay
  • SSL expires and you find out from a customer
  • Form breaks silently — leads vanish for weeks
  • Analytics setup takes a weekend, then nobody checks it
  • Every site change requires a developer invoice
  • Transactional emails land in spam
  • "It was working last month" becomes your catchphrase

Treetop-Managed

  • One invoice, one point of contact
  • SSL, DNS, and certs auto-renewed forever
  • Every form submission hits your CRM instantly
  • Monthly analytics report in plain English
  • 4 hours of site updates included each month
  • Email sent from your domain, DKIM/SPF configured
  • 24/7 uptime monitoring with alert-and-fix SLA
Pricing

Simple, flat-rate pricing.

No per-seat charges. No usage spikes. No surprises on your invoice.

per month

  • Hosting on global CDN
  • Custom domain & SSL
  • Transactional email (your domain)
  • Contact form → CRM routing
  • Monthly analytics report
  • Uptime monitoring & alerts
  • 2 hours of site updates / month
  • Email support (next business day)

per month

per month

Get Started

What you'd pay doing it yourself

Hosting (Vercel / Netlify Pro) $20/mo
Domain + DNS (Cloudflare) $15/mo
Transactional email (Resend / Postmark) $25/mo
CRM / database (Airtable / HubSpot) $45/mo
Analytics (GA4 setup + dashboard) $0*
Developer time (freelancer, ~5 hrs) $500+/mo
Total DIY cost $600+
FAQ

Common questions.

Do I keep my current domain?

Yes. We point your existing domain to our infrastructure. No downtime, no email disruption. If you need a new domain, we'll register and configure it for you.

What if I need more than 4 hours of updates?

Additional hours are billed at $100/hr. Most clients stay well within their allotment. Larger projects (full redesigns, new sections) are scoped separately.

Can I bring my own design?

Absolutely. Bring a Figma file, a Canva mockup, or just a napkin sketch. We build it out. Or we design it for you based on your brand guidelines.

What's the contract term?

Month-to-month. No long-term contracts. If you leave, we export your site and data so you can self-host. We earn your business every month.

What CRM do you use?

We start with Airtable for most clients — it's flexible, visual, and easy for non-technical teams. We're also building a dedicated CRM (Billy) that will be available to managed clients first.

Do you build e-commerce sites?

We integrate with Shopify, Stripe, and WooCommerce. We don't replace your e-comm platform — we make sure your marketing site, email, and analytics all talk to it properly.

Ready?

Stop managing your stack.
Start growing your business.

Book a 30-minute kickoff call. We'll audit your current setup and show you exactly what the migration looks like.
